summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DreamerZ_Beta AI Training web application. Backend APIs working with 85.7% success rate, frontend fully functional with all key features operational.

minor_bugs.issue: CORS headers missing from API responses
minor_bugs.impact: May affect cross-origin requests, but same-origin requests work fine

minor_bugs.issue: Rate limiting not enforcing 10 requests per minute limit
minor_bugs.impact: Users could potentially make excessive API calls

ui_bugs.issue: Missing data-testid attribute for stage tabs

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section, ROI benefits, CTAs
Tools page shows 5 tool cards with proper data
Tool journey page shows modules and allows clicking first module
Module content displays explanation, example, activity sections
Quiz functionality - selecting answers, submitting, showing results
Prompt Lab - entering prompts and getting AI responses (1057 chars received)
AI /api/ai endpoint works with safety filters
Parents page loads with safety information
AI integration with GPT-5.2 working (not demo mode)
Safety filters properly blocking unsafe content
All prompt lab modes (base, context, constraints) working
Progress tracking elements visible on Tools page
